name: Darjeeling
shortDescription: A stunning temple located in the heart of West Bengal, offering breathtaking views and cultural heritage.
fullDescription: Darjeeling is one of the most prominent tourist attractions in West Bengal. Attracting thousands of visitors every year, it offers a deep dive into the rich history and vibrant culture of the region. Visitors can enjoy a serene atmosphere combined with excellent local cuisine and hospitality.
history: The history of Darjeeling dates back several centuries. Originally built as a stronghold, it evolved over time to become a cultural center. Numerous historical texts mention it as a pivotal location during the colonial era.
whyFamous: Famous for its incredible architecture, historical significance, and the unparalleled beauty of its natural surroundings.
address: Main Road, Kolkata, West Bengal, India
